name: Yum Yum Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom of a 9-by-13-inch pan with graham crackers. If necessary, break crackers to fit.
2. Crush enough crackers (about 7) to equal 1 cup of crumbs.
3. In a saucepan, combine granulated sugar, 1 cup (2 sticks) margarine, milk, and egg. Boil for about 2 minutes or until the mixture thickens slightly.
4. Remove from heat; add nuts, graham cracker crumbs, and coconut. Spread over graham crackers in the pan.
5. Top with another layer of graham crackers; press gently.
6. To make frosting, mix together remaining 1/2 cup (1 stick) margarine, powdered sugar, and enough lemon juice to make the mixture spread easily. Spread over graham crackers in the pan.
7. Refrigerate until cool, then cut into bars.
Yield: 2 to 3 dozen bars.
